Di'zok Wristsnapper  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: RANGE PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Blunt Atk Delay: 18
DMG: 10 Dmg Bonus: 35 AC: 5
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
CHA: +7 INT: +7 AGI: +7
WT: 1.5 Size: SMALL
Class: BRD
Race: HUM ELF HEF VAH DRK
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

On Aradun TLP (currently Kunark) I can't put this in Range, Pri Sec only.

This in Ranged Slot?
QuoteReply
# May 27 2003 at 2:45 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591771215395
2 posts
Why would I want this in the ranged slot? Just for the stat bonus, or is there some mele use for it?

I got mine for 300p, guy that sold did not know (or care) that it was worth more, he just auctioned it in POK and I picked it up.
▲ Page top
This in Ranged Slot?
QuoteReply
# Nov 15 2016 at 5:03 PM Rating: Excellent
snailish
4,580 posts
cheako wrote:
Why would I want this in the ranged slot? Just for the stat bonus, or is there some mele use for it?

I got mine for 300p, guy that sold did not know (or care) that it was worth more, he just auctioned it in POK and I picked it up.



A lot of 1hb items made in classic and Kunark are flagged as range as well, kind of a design lore approach... "hammers get thrown" if you will.
▲ Page top
Insane
QuoteReply
# Mar 07 2003 at 9:46 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591786912731
19 posts
This weapon is great on pvp at lvl 38 i just got a nice trade on this.I trade a fishbone earing which i camped for this and now I rock every single caster i fight on PvP.The delay is so low that they don't have enough time to get a spell off especially when i am hasted and have them slowed while dotting them.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Feb 04 2003 at 3:19 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) shut your damn mouth, useless peice of guide crap. im biast because i didnt reveice an answer to my petition for hours today, but what the hell does the man gain from ******** about it HERE? and any hacker would do it if it was profitable, he could hack higher level accounts and sell them on for good cash. just because an incident wasnt told to you (or if it was your useless brain cant recall it) doesnt mean it doesnt happen.
regarding hacked account
QuoteReply
# Jan 19 2003 at 12:46 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252262734
View User Forum
43 posts


QUOTE " was using Symphonic Saber as primary and Sionches Partisan (I hope thats the name of it) in my secondary, with the Di'zok in my ranged, and let me tell you this worked out Great. Well i had them till my account was hacked but its alright. :)

Mneumonic Lyrist
50 Bard
Tunare
Those with wings...Fly to your dreams. END QUOTE

What a bunch of bull.. had your account hacked... I have beeen a guide for EQ for over a year now, and every incident where poeple say they have their account hacked is because somehow you gave your info out, or someone seen your password written down.. ect ect .. there has note been 1 .. not 1 legit hacked account.. what it would take to do it would be so far up there, that a hacker wouldnt even waste his time messing with something like eq, but something worth the risk.. so please , take your "I was hacked " bull crap to someone else ..


▲ Page top
RE: regarding hacked account
QuoteReply
# Apr 18 2004 at 12:57 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591774791355
Scholar
38 posts
It's easy to hack someone's EQ pw, you just use a spyware app with a keylogger, when they log in you got thier pw. Any idiot can do it, and apparently any idiot can become a guide...
▲ Page top
RE: regarding hacked account
QuoteReply
# Mar 02 2004 at 7:11 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592259816431
7 posts
Yea, gotta add my 2 cents here too.. I have had friends who have been hacked and lost stuff, as well as myself. And I can tell you, not one of my friends, or anyone else for that matter, has ever been given my account info, ever. So please explain how my account was compromised? I don't even normally respond to such troll bait as yourself, but I had to in this instance. If you are truly a guide, I sure hope you don't live on Emarr. And I hope they weed you out soon wherever you reside..

# Jul 15 2002 at 12:01 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251831970
105 posts
Sorry to here your account was hacked, I hope it wasn't a total loss.....but anyways, main reason I wanted to post was to ask a question to all you knowledgable EQ gurus out there. Mneumonic said they had their Symphonic Saber in his primary and Sionachies Partisan (bite me, spellcheckers) in their secondary. Correct me if I'm wrong, and please do if am, but shouldn't the faster of the two (partisan) be in the primary? Of course, the difference between wheather it's in you Pri or Sec could be so minute it probably won't matter.

That's all I really wanted to ask. And about the Wristsnapper....damn nice weepon ya gat thar. I wouldn't mind one myself, need to get that 1hb above skill (4) though :)
▲ Page top
RE: I had
QuoteReply
# Jul 16 2002 at 4:50 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591780686837
3 posts
Okies mate hehe the reason i had the symphonic in primary was because of the proc when we have a tank and you know YOU KNOW you can gain more agro than him you want that proc to work cause he has 3 times your HP :) and when in primary you seem to hit with it more...of course. I hope this reply helps mate and good luck to you.

Mneumonic Lyrist
51 Bard
Tunare

where this dropped
QuoteReply
# Oct 12 2001 at 3:12 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591754200976
1 post
The house in between zone-in and zone-out, there are 2 parts. The part on the left, the mob that spawns all the way to the left, "a watch sergeant," or something like that is the PH. for a named sergeant.

he drops this weapon. he also drops nathsar sleeves. i've killed him twice, i won this weapon in a /random, and we didnt bother to roll on the sleeves.

Seranthic T'sarith
60 High Priest on Druzzil Ro

# Jul 14 2002 at 8:43 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591755789514
61 posts
sigh another monk post because of the weight. Iv've said it before and here it goes again, Just because its low weight doesn't mean its monk useable (best example is Rygorr BP weighs 1.0). I've also seen monk useable items that are kinda heavy for any monk to even consider.
Sum it up:
Low weight does NOT equal Monk item :P

nice ranged
QuoteReply
# Oct 09 2001 at 5:28 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592248758846
View User Forum
161 posts
I have a 14th lvl Bard and she only has 1hs and piercing but i wouldnt mind having this in her ranged slot :o) well good hunting and safe journey to all.
▲ Page top
RE: nice ranged
QuoteReply
# Oct 10 2001 at 9:13 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592250166807
Scholar
69 posts
Same ratio as Breath of Harmony. Doesn't have the proc, but it does have some other goodies. This probably won't be in any range slots until the weilding bard has their epic in their primary, and something better than this in their offhand (could be a while for that to happen).
Pretty much any bard would trade their BoH for this, because its much more versatile (BoH is primary only), and this is an item that will probably be kept for the life of the bard since it fits in the range slot.
Depending on the rarity of this item, I wouldn't take less than 30k for it on Bertox. But you could probably draw up to 40k depending on the server.
This is the nicest tradeable bard only weapon currently in-game. Expect some very nice trades for this item.
▲ Page top
RE: nice ranged
QuoteReply
# Oct 12 2001 at 2:05 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592342517699
Sage
78 posts

I'd love to have one of these to go with my Tier'dal Sai until I got my epic. The Wristsnapper is pretty light too (as opposed to the Tier'dal Sai, which is pretty heavy).

And this has got to have one of the cooler names of all weapons, or at least of all bard-only weapons.

#Anonymous, Posted: Oct 10 2001 at 3:26 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) goodbye.

RE: Dmg Bonus
QuoteReply
# Oct 09 2001 at 4:02 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592248322158
282 posts
According to a recent verant post on the developer's corner, that damage bonus is visible to classes that can use two-handed weapons only. This would make sense since the screenshot comes from a cleric (able to use 2hb). It doesn't explain why it shows on a one-handed weapon, but hell, @ least bards won't have to deal w/ it cluttering up item info boxes. =P

Oh yeah, damn fine weapon. I want one.

Wow, range equippable too...
▲ Page top
RE: Dmg Bonus
QuoteReply
# Oct 15 2001 at 6:15 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1613953123884
View User Forum
86 posts
I was lucky enough to receive one of these. I'm a wood elf bard on Rodcet Nife. It does display the damage bonus, and it REALLY puts me high on the aggro list with all the hits I get with it. I'm using a Symphonic Sabre in my offhand, but I'm getting aggro in a full group with a primary and backup tank with just these weapons and VoV haste within seconds of the Symphonic proc. I never realized how much aggro a fast delay weapon produced until this. Caveat Emptor. ;)
▲ Page top
RE: Dmg Bonus
QuoteReply
# Oct 09 2001 at 5:17 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592249921043
157 posts
I don't know. I have a BABS and it doesn't display any DMG bonus on it, I'm a Shadow Knight btw, but I looted a whip from a sarnak berserker in OT today and it was 1hs and had a dmg bonus thingy on it. So.... What's up Verant?
▲ Page top
RE: Dmg Bonus
QuoteReply
# Oct 23 2001 at 4:02 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592249764464
1 post
The Dmg Bonus tag on weapons show on any weapons looted from AFTER the patch was installed; weapons you had before the patch will still have a bonus (assuming the 'new' one has one), but you won't be able to see the tag.
▲ Page top
